subject: Tentacruel — large dark blue jellyfish-like creature with prominent red eyes and multiple tentacles in a dark ocean setting
description: A large, imposing jellyfish-like creature floats in a dark aquatic environment. Its body is dark blue and bulbous, with large, glowing red eyes prominent on its upper form. Multiple tentacles extend downward from its body. The overall color palette is deep blue and dark, with the red eyes providing a striking focal contrast. The setting is clearly deep or murky water, dark and foreboding.
foreground: large dark blue jellyfish creature with glowing red eyes and multiple tentacles
background: dark ocean or deep water, murky blue-black
